content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

**1. What is the Current Market Regime?**
CAUTION regime — low volatility but narrow participation. Vol: 23.7%; Breadth: 2/8 sectors positive.

**2. Which sectors are leading?**
Construction & REIT leadership anchored by TKFEN (1W: +16.97% | 1M: +51.37%) ABOVE TREND and ENKAI (1W: +? | 1M: +? ) — note: focus on TKFEN and EKGYO (1W: -6.00% | 1M: +6.01%) CORRECTION shows dispersion. Energy & Chemicals strong via TUPRS (1W: +8.30% | 1M: +14.07%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +8.01% | 1M: +23.84%) ABOVE TREND and SASA (1W: +6.05% | 1M: +39.33%) ABOVE TREND.

**3. Which sectors are lagging?**
Banking & Finance is weakest with AKBNK (1W: -7.00% | 1M: +15.54%) CORRECTION and GARAN (1W: -6.63% | 1M: +12.25%) CORRECTION. Technology & Telecom and Transportation lag — KONTR (1W: -18.90% | 1M: +21.18%) CORRECTION and THYAO (1W: -2.58% | 1M: +9.20%) CORRECTION highlight the weakness.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

**4. Top Performing Stocks?**
TKFEN (1W: +16.97% | 1M: +51.37%) ABOVE TREND; TUPRS (1W: +8.30% | 1M: +14.07%) ABOVE TREND; PETKM (1W: +8.01% | 1M: +23.84%) ABOVE TREND; DOHOL (1W: +6.53% | 1M: +10.55%) ABOVE TREND; SASA (1W: +6.05% | 1M: +39.33%) ABOVE TREND.

**5. Worst Performing Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: -18.90% | 1M: +21.18%) CORRECTION; TRALT (1W: -7.49% | 1M: +8.55%) CORRECTION; TRMET (1W: -7.09% | 1M: +4.13%) CORRECTION; VAKBN (1W: -7.01% | 1M: +5.18%) CORRECTION; AKBNK (1W: -7.00% | 1M: +15.54%) CORRECTION.

**6. Momentum Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: -18.90% | 1M: +21.18%) CORRECTION; TKFEN (1W: +16.97% | 1M: +51.37%) ABOVE TREND; TUPRS (1W: +8.30% | 1M: +14.07%) ABOVE TREND; PETKM (1W: +8.01% | 1M: +23.84%) ABOVE TREND; TRALT (1W: -7.49% | 1M: +8.55%) CORRECTION.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

**7. Banking Sector Outlook?**
Banking looks vulnerable and corrective; AKBNK (1W: -7.00% | 1M: +15.54%) CORRECTION, GARAN (1W: -6.63% | 1M: +12.25%) CORRECTION, ISCTR (1W: -5.29% | 1M: +13.21%) CORRECTION — signs of profit-taking despite positive 1M.

**8. Industrial Sector Outlook?**
Heavy industry mixed: EREGL (1W: +4.87% | 1M: +24.91%) ABOVE TREND and ASELS (1W: +0.24% | 1M: +22.78%) ABOVE TREND show strength, while FROTO (1W: -6.13% | 1M: -0.10%) BELOW TREND flags idiosyncratic weakness.

**9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?**
Energy remains the clearest opportunity: TUPRS (1W: +8.30% | 1M: +14.07%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +8.01% | 1M: +23.84%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +6.05% | 1M: +39.33%) ABOVE TREND; watch TRMET (1W: -7.09% | 1M: +4.13%) CORRECTION and TRALT (1W: -7.49% | 1M: +8.55%) CORRECTION for rotation risks.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

**10. Portfolio Recommendation?**
Under CAUTION: favor selective longs in Energy & Construction (TUPRS, PETKM, TKFEN, EREGL) and trim banking/tech exposure; keep position sizing tight and use stop-based risk management given narrow breadth.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

**11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?**
TKFEN (1W: +16.97% | 1M: +51.37%) ABOVE TREND for continuation/risk-off unwind; TUPRS (1W: +8.30% | 1M: +14.07%) ABOVE TREND on commodity flows; PETKM (1W: +8.01% | 1M: +23.84%) ABOVE TREND for earnings/cash flow focus; KONTR (1W: -18.90% | 1M: +21.18%) CORRECTION for volatility-driven moves.

**12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?**
Energy & Chemicals, Construction & REIT, and Banking & Finance (for flow reversals).

**13. Key Levels & Triggers?**
Watch XU100 momentum around the recent 1-week trading range for either re-acceleration into the 1-month highs or re-test of multi-week support; catalysts include commodity moves, bank-specific flows/earnings and any macro data or FX volatility spikes.

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Low-volatility but narrow participation keeps us in a CAUTION regime: Energy and Construction lead while Banking, Tech and Transport lag. Trade selectively — overweight identified energy/construction winners, trim broad beta and enforce stops given concentration risk.
